title: Mirror unified location metadata through app interface status
description: The app-interface status snapshot still mirrors only legacy location/time fields. Extend lichen_app_location_time_snapshot and conversion tests to carry HAL source class, source name, fix state, age, and accuracy/freshness metadata so Meshtastic, MeshCore, KISS, native clients, and UI can consume the same provider state without HAL-specific enums leaking accidentally. Acceptance: app_interface native_sim tests cover absent, fresh, stale, and named-source snapshots.
notes:
2026-07-01 completed no-hardware app-interface mirror slice. Added app-interface location source-class and fix-state enums, appended source_class/source_name/fix_state/age_seconds/horizontal_accuracy_mm/vertical_accuracy_mm fields to lichen_app_location_time_snapshot after legacy fields, and added an explicit HAL bridge API lichen_app_location_time_from_hal() in lichen/app_interface/hal_bridge.h. The bridge maps HAL enums to app-interface enums via switches, copies fixed source_name storage, carries age/accuracy/source/fix metadata, and is compiled only when CONFIG_LICHEN_HAL=y so core CONFIG_LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE remains HAL-independent. App-interface tests now enable CONFIG_LICHEN_HAL for bridge coverage and assert fresh named metadata, stale metadata, absent zeroed metadata, HAL-to-app enum isolation/conversion, invalid bridge arguments, and source-name copying.

Review evidence: initial reviews Ramanujan and Maxwell found P2 gaps: new fields were inserted before legacy fields, and tests only round-tripped already-app-shaped structs rather than proving HAL-to-app conversion. Fixed by append-only layout and explicit HAL bridge/tests. Final reviewers Popper and Galileo then found a P2 undeclared HAL dependency from an unconditional bridge include. Fixed by moving conversion into conditional hal_bridge.c, gating source/include path on CONFIG_LICHEN_HAL, and enabling HAL only in bridge tests. Final re-review agents Lagrange the 5th and Poincare the 5th found no P0/P1/P2 issues.

Validation on EC2 builder i-05e27e074db786e22, EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58, clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-location-v1: git diff --check PASS. Focused Twister after final fix: west twister -T lichen/tests/app_interface -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --integration --outdir twister-out-location-app-interface-v4 -x=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen PASS, 1/2 configurations passed, 1 static skip, 16 executed cases, 16 skipped, 0 warnings, 20.17s. Broader consumer regression: west twister -T lichen/tests/app_interface -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_codec -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --integration --outdir twister-out-location-app-consumers-v3 -x=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen PASS, 3/5 configurations passed, 2 static skips, 70 executed cases, 38 skipped, 0 warnings, 67.55s.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware app-interface location metadata mirror with HAL bridge, tests, two clean final review passes, and EC2 Twister evidence.
